title: BYD Blade Battery
desc: The BYD Blade Battery redefines safety in electric vehicles. With an innovative cell-to-pack design, it passes the nail penetration test without fire or explosion — a feat no other lithium battery has achieved.

title: BYD e-Platform 3.0
desc: BYD e-Platform 3.0 is a comprehensive electric vehicle architecture that integrates an 8-in-1 electric powertrain, delivering higher efficiency, longer range and faster charging.

title: BYD Super DM
desc: BYD Super DM plug-in hybrid technology delivers exceptional fuel efficiency and outstanding electric-only range, combining the best of both worlds for a revolutionary driving experience.
